name: GLM-5
_comment_n_kv: MLA approximation: kv_lora_rank=512, qk_rope_head_dim=64; n_kv=5 gives H_kv=384 (~3% under). The explicit num_key_value_heads=64 in the config is the head-equivalent count, not the compressed latent count.
_comment_k_active: 8 routed experts + 1 shared expert (always active). Shared expert approximated by k=9.
_comment_n_moe_layers: first_k_dense_replace=3 → first 3 layers are dense, remaining 75 are MoE.
_comment_caveats: DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) with index_topk=2048 not modeled — reduces real attention FLOPs at long context; framework treats attention as full O(S²).
